title: End of Evangelion poster
wikitext:
[]: End of Evangelion poster             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Oct 14, 2006 8:55 pm Specifically this poster. Does anyone know where a clean coppy of that image is, and does anyone know how accurate this translation is?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Oct 14, 2006 9:05 pm Ive seen that somewhere before I forgot where... everytime I saw it i screamed "Misato!" :cry: poor Misato

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sun Oct 15, 2006 7:22 am I have it. But not on me :( dakara minna (stupid kanji)ndeshimaeba iinoni...

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Oct 15, 2006 11:36 am "Stupid Kanji" is "shi", meaning "die" or "death".

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 15, 2006 11:37 am why does the english version look like crap? Did Mangle get a hold of it?

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Sun Oct 15, 2006 3:17 pm Awesome poster. :O The only people I recognize for sure are Misato, Rei, and Asuka. Maybe Maya is to the left (my left) of Misato? And the school girl below Rei. The only person I think it could be would be Hikari, unless its just someone random. And is that mysterious floating white thing covered by text Ritsuko?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Sun Oct 15, 2006 7:17 pm The English version is notably worse than the Japanese version. What with their pixels and uhm... Not having to translate anything since it's more than likely the original version... And uhm... I'm out of fuel there. To be perfectly honest, I wouldn't want that poster hanging in my room... I've got enough issues to deal with to wake up one morning, reminded how terrible the world is to see that poster...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 15, 2006 8:50 pm I can't really read any of the small print Kanji (I barely know any Kanji anyway!), but going by memory of the words in the film/etc, the huge text means something along the lines of: dakara minna shindeshi maeba ii no ni... "So, everyone should just die..." And the texts towards the bottom means this: dewa, anata ni wa naze koko ni iru no? "Then, why are you here?" ...koko ni itemo, ii no? "...Is it alright for me to be here?" So yeah, the translations of that seem more or less okay. And all the movie info (End of Eva: Air/etc...) looks correct. So, where'd you get this translated poster from anyway? I'm wondering if there are some for the two Death & Rebirth posters out there... (And why's the image quality of this one so bad?! )

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 15, 2006 9:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: the huge text means something along the lines of: dakara minna shindeshi maeba ii no ni... "So, everyone should just die..."

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Oct 15, 2006 9:40 pm I found the English one a while ago in my travels online. My guess is the poster suffers from Bad jpg compression, and bad photoshopping. I think it's fan done. I want a clean image so I can make a better one.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Oct 15, 2006 10:36 pm Since this is relevant to the topic at hand... This is my poster:

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Oct 16, 2006 12:21 am AuthenticM wrote: Since this is relevant to the topic at hand...

[]:             Quote Post by toReason » Mon Oct 16, 2006 3:46 am I always have wondered about that EoE poster (english version). Is it really just fan made and posted online rather than an actual poster sold commercially?

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Mon Oct 16, 2006 8:54 am cat42 wrote: AuthenticM wrote: Since this is relevant to the topic at hand...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 16, 2006 9:51 am cat42 wrote: My guess is the poster suffers from Bad jpg compression, and bad photoshopping. I think it's fan done.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Mon Oct 16, 2006 10:39 am There's a clean one in 'Die Sterne', but I moved all those files over to my apartment. I torrented it a few months ago, so someone else probably has it. Actually; try 4chan. I've actually gotten some help with translation and stuff over there. "Anyone got a hi-rez version of this?"

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 16, 2006 10:48 am I have three clean versions on my HD (including the Die Sterne one), but the problem is that none of them look as good as the version in the poster or contain the entire image. If that doesn't matter, I'll can post all three later and let ya pick. One of them is my own scan from Groundwork of Movie 1; I need to finish editing out some of the tiny hairs and dust specks with the clone brush, but that shouldn't take too long.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Oct 16, 2006 11:26 pm Thank you Rachael, I'd definately like copies of your scans when you are done. I think I might try 4chan as well later tonight.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Oct 17, 2006 12:10 am cat42 wrote: Thank you Rachael, I'd definately like copies of your scans when you are done. I think I might try 4chan as well later tonight.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Tue Oct 17, 2006 5:05 am Worked for me? I won't say no to more versions of that pic, because I always adored it. Might as well not shrink it at all, if you will =)
summary:
[]: End of Evangelion poster             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Oct 14, 2006 8:55 pm Specifically this poster. Does anyone know where a clean coppy of that image is, and does anyone know how accurate this translation is?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Oct 14, 2006 9:05 pm Ive seen that somewhere before I forgot where... everytime I saw it i screamed "Misat
